2026-27 Men's Basketball Roster

Doug Fejer

Shravan Narayan
Sidney Smith
Sidney Smith

Jaden Jefferson #10 G

  • Position:
    Guard
  • Height:
    6-3
  • Weight:
    190
  • Class:
    Junior
  • Hometown:
    Forney, Texas
  • Highschool:
    Forney
  • Summary
  • Media
  • Season
  • Career
  • Historical

Summary

Biography

2025-26: Games played/started: 9/9...averaged 19.0 points and 4.2 rebounds per game...recorded 171 points, 38 rebounds, 30 assists, nine blocked shots and 17 steals...shot 50.8 percent (30-for-72) overall, 41.7 percent (30-of-72) from three-point range and 63.3 percent (19-of-30) from the line...scored in double-digits in all nine games...scored 31 points on 11-of-23 shooting with eight rebounds, five assists, two blocks and two steals against West Texas A&M on Dec. 13...had 24 points, seven boards, five assists  and two steals in Comet debut on Dec. 11...dished out six assists with 18 points at UT Permian Basion on Jan. 17

Previous College: Spent freshman season at Des Moines Area Community College in Iowa...earned Second Team All-Region honors and helped the Bears to a 29-5 record and trip to the NJCAA National Tournament...played in 28 games with 13 starts...averaged 10.8 points and 4.8 rebounds per game...recorded 302 points, 135 rebounds, 52 assists, 37 blocks and 40 steals...shot 46 percent (109-for-237) from the field and 75.7 percent (56-of-74) from the line...also made 28 three-pointers

High School: Competed in basketball and baseball for Forney High School

Major: Healthcare Studies
